# Security Policy

### Reporting a vulnerability

Please do not open GitHub issues or pull requests - this makes the problem immediately visible to everyone, including malicious actors.

Security issues in this open-source project can be safely reported to Telnyx at [security@telnyx.com](mailto:security@telnyx.com). Telnyx's security team will triage your report and respond according to its impact on Telnyx users and systems.
